not_found.name: Unknown
description: Unable to find the requested domain.

air.name: Air
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You can manipulate lightning, mist, and wind, traffic with air creatures, and are resistant to electricity damage.

::ab[Lightning Arc (Sp)]{id=arc icon=zap standard="Target any foe within 30 ft. with a ranged touch attack, dealing 1d6 electricity damage + 1 point for every two cleric levels you possess." useMod=Wis3}
::ab[Electricity Resistance (Ex)]{id=res icon=def l6="Gain ‹umr/resist› electricity 10" l12="Resistance increases to 20" l20="‹umr/Immune› to electricity"}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="obscuring mist~wind wall~gaseous form~air walk~control winds~chain lightning~elemental body IV|air only~whirlwind~elemental swarm|air spell only" save=domain}

::ab[Thundercloud (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹electricity resistance/#res›› power of the Air domain" l=8 icon=magic standard="Summon a storm cloud. This power functions as ‹spell/fog cloud› except that creatures inside the cloud are ‹misc/deafened› and take 2d6 points of electricity damage each round from the flashes of thunder and lightning. Once created, you can concentrate on the cloud to move it up to 30 feet each round." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l4="solid fog" l9="storm of vengeance"}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}

::ab[Lightning Rod (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹electricity resistance/#res›› power of the Air domain" l=8 icon=magic swift="When you cast a spell with the electricity descriptor, you can designate one creature within line of sight. The spell's damage against that creature increases by 50%, as if affected by the ‹feat/Empower Spell› feat. This additional damage results from divine power that is not subject to being reduced by electricity resistance, and you take an equal amount of electricity damage immediately after you cast the spell. The spell can deal this additional damage only once, even if it could affect the target multiple times." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="shocking grasp" l2="flame blade|deals electricity damage and gains the electricity descriptor instead of fire" l3="lightning bolt"}

::ab[Wind Blast (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹lightning arc/#arc›› power of the Air domain" l=8 icon=line standard="Unleash a blast of air in a 30-foot line. Make a combat maneuver check against each creature in the line, using your caster level as your base attack bonus and your Wisdom modifier in place of your Strength modifier. Treat the results as a ‹rule/bull rush› attempt." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="whispering wind" l6="wind walk" l9="winds of vengeance"}

animal.name: Animal
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You can speak with and befriend animals with ease.
::ab[Class Skill (Ex)]{passive="You treat Knowledge (nature) as a class skill." icon=power}
::ab[Speak with Animals (Sp)]{id=speak icon=magic standard="You can ‹spell/speak with animals›, as per the spell." useL3=cleric useNC}

::ab[Animal Companion (Ex)]{l=4 icon=power passive="You gain the service of an ‹sidekick/animal companion›. Your effective druid level for this animal companion is equal to your cleric level - 3. (Druids who take this ability through their nature bond class feature use their druid level - 3 to determine the abilities of their animal companions)."}

::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="calm animals~hold animal~dominate animal~summon nature's ally IV|animals only~beast shape III|animals only~antilife shell~animal shapes~summon nature's ally VIII|animals only~shapechange" save=domain}
@HL[Replacement Power:] Add Fly to your list of class skills. In addition, whenever you cast a spell that grants you a fly speed, your maneuverability increases by one step (up to perfect).

::ab[Eyes of the Hawk (Ex)]{replace="The ‹‹speak with animals/#speak›› power of the Animal domain" icon=boost passive="You gain a racial bonus on Perception checks equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum +1). In addition, if you can act during a surprise round, you receive a +2 racial bonus on your Initiative check."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="feather fall" l3=fly l6="mass fly"}

::ab[Predator's Grace (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹speak with animals/#speak›› power of the Animal domain" icon=boost swift="Grant yourself a +10-foot bonus to your base speed for 1 round. This bonus increases by 5 feet for every 5 cleric levels you possess. In addition, you gain low-light vision for 1 round. If you already possess low-light vision, the range of your sight becomes three times that of a human in dim light for 1 round." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="magic fang" l3="beast shape I|animals only"}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}

@HL[Replacement Power:] The domain spells provided by the Insect domain affect vermin rather than animals, treating them as if they were not immune to spells with the mind-affecting descriptor. Any such spell that allows a Will save can instead be negated by the target vermin with a successful Fortitude save at the same DC.

::ab[Exoskeleton (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹speak with animals/#speak›› power of the Animal domain" icon=def swift="Grow an exoskeleton that grants you a +1 enhancement bonus to your natural armor and 1d4 ‹rule/temporary hit points› + 1 for every 2 cleric levels you have. The natural armor bonus increases by 1 for every 5 cleric levels you have. The exoskeleton retracts after 1 round, ending its benefits." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l4="giant vermin" l5="vermin shape II" l8="summon nature's ally VIII|1d3 goliath stag beetles"}

artifice.name: Artifice
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You can repair damage to objects, animate objects with life, and create objects from nothing.

::ab[Artificer's Touch (Sp)]{id=touch icon=touch standard="You can cast ‹spell/mending› at will, using your cleric level as the caster level to repair damaged objects. In addition, you can cause damage to objects and construct creatures by striking them with a melee touch attack. Objects and constructs take 1d6 points of damage +1 for every two cleric levels you possess. This attack bypasses an amount of damage reduction and hardness equal to your cleric level." useMod=Wis3}
::ab[Dancing Weapons (Su)]{l=8 id=dance icon=boost standard="You can give a weapon touched the ‹magic-enh/dancing› special weapon quality for 4 rounds." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
Alternately, you can choose to learn an ‹ability/annointing<s› instead of gaining the dancing weapons ability at 8th level.
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="animate rope~wood shape~stone shape~minor creation~fabricate~major creation~wall of iron~instant summons~prismatic sphere" save=domain}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}

::ab[Divine Alchemy (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹artificer's touch/#touch›› power of the Artifice domain" icon=magic ability="You can perform a 1-minute ritual that infuses a flask of water with one of your prepared spells, creating an improvised potion that lasts until consumed or the next time you prepare spells. You can use this ability only with spells that target one or more creatures, and the maximum spell level you can infuse in this way is equal to 1 + 1 for every 4 cleric levels you have. These potions are treated as ‹class/alchemist› extracts for the purpose of your domain spells." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="touch injection" l4="amplify elixir" l6="delayed consumption"}

::ab[Animate Servant (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹dancing weapon/#dance›› power of the Artifice domain" l=8 icon=magic standard="You can give life to inanimate objects. This ability functions as ‹spell/animate objects› using your cleric level as the caster level." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l7="limited wish" l8="polymorph any object"}

::ab[Aura of Efficiency (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹dancing weapon/#dance›› power of the Artifice domain" l=8 icon=protect standard="You can emit a 30-foot-radius aura that grants your allies a +4 bonus on all saving throws against effects that inflict the ‹misc/fatigued› or ‹misc/exhausted› condition. Any equipment wielded by your allies within this area gets a bonus to hardness equal to 1/2 your cleric level, and your allies' attacks against targets within this area ignore an equal amount of hardness." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="crafter's fortune" l7="mage's magnificent mansion" l9="wooden phalanx"}

::ab[Aura of Repetition (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹dancing weapon/#dance›› power of the Artifice domain" l=8 icon=aura standard="You can emit a 30-foot aura of repetition. All enemies within this aura must make a Will save each round or repeat their action from the previous round (if possible). Creatures that attacked on the previous round attack again on the following round, although they may change their target. Creatures that moved the previous round must take the same move action again, although they may change their route. Creatures that drank a potion must do so again, even they can only drink from an empty bottle. Actions that cannot be repeated are wasted." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=command l5="waves of fatigue" l7="waves of exhaustion"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] Note: Only creatures with the ‹trait/Kobold Faith› trait can take this subdomain.

::ab[Supernatural Trap (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹dancing weapons/#dance›› power of the Artifice domain" l=8 icon=power ability="When you gain this ability, select a supernatural ‹ability/ranger trap<s›. You are now able make this trap. The DCs for Perception checks, Disable Device checks, and saving throws against the trap are equal to 10 + 1/2 your character level + your Wisdom bonus. The trap lasts for 1 hour or until triggered." useMod=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2=snare l3="improve trap" l7="teleport trap"}

alchemy.name: Alchemy
description: This subdomain is associated with both the ‹domain/Artifice› and ‹domain/Magic› domains.

chaos.name: Chaos
description: ::list[Deities]{link=faith all="Abhoth~Abraxas~Acavna~Aldinach~Andirifkhu~Angazhan~Apep~Areshkagal~Ashava~Ashukharma~Azathoth~Baphomet~Bastet~Bergelmir~Besmara~Black Butterfly~Bokrug~Calistria~Camazotz~Cayden Cailean~Cernunnos~Chadali~Chaugnar Faugn~Chavazvug~Chucaro~Count Ranalc~Cthulhu~Cyth-V'sug~Daclau-Sar~Dagon~Dahak~Deskari~Desna~Dretha~Elion~Findeladlara~Flauros~Ghlaunder~Gogunta~Gorum~Groetus~Guyuku~Gyronna~Haagenti~Haggakal~Hanspur~Hastur~Hathor~Hei Feng~Hembad~Il'surrish~Immonhiel~Isph-Aun-Vuln~Ithaqua~Izyagna~Jalaijatali~Jezelda~Jubilex~Kabriri~Keltheald~Ketephys~Kitumu~Kofusachi~Kostchtchie~Kro'akoth~Lady Nanbyo~Lalaci~Lamashtu~Lanishra~Marishi~Mazmezz~Menxyr~Mestama~Mhar~Milani~Mordiggian~Murnath~Narriseminek~Nephthys~Nhimbaloth~Nightripper~Nocticula~Nocticula (Redeemed)~Nulgreth~Nurgal~Nyarlathotep (Black Pharaoh)~Nyarlathotep (Faceless Sphinx)~Nyarlathotep (Haunter of the Dark)~Oaur-Ooung~Ongalte~Onmyuza~Orcus~Orgesh~Ovonovo~Pazuzu~Picoperi~Pulura~Ragadahn~Reymenda~Rhan-Tegoth~Rovagug~Rull~Sekhmet~Selket~Sezelrian~Shamira~Shax~Shiggarreb~Shivaska~Shub-Niggurath~Sifkesh~Sinashakti~Sithhud~Skode~Skrymir~Sobek~Socothbenoth~Speakers of the Depths~Ssila'meshnik~Sun Wukong~Thamir Gixx~The Lantern King~Thisamet~Thremyr~Thuskchoon~Tjasse~Tolc~Treerazer~Tsathoggua~Urazra~Urxehl~Ushitora~Valani~Varg~Verex~Xoveron~Yamasoth~Ydajisk~Ydersius~Yhidothrus~Yig~Yog-Sothoth~Zagresh~Zevgavizeb~Zogmugot~Zura"}
@HL[Granted Powers:] Your touch infuses life and weapons with chaos, and you revel in all things anarchic.

::ab[Touch of Chaos (Sp)]{id=touch icon=touch-roll standard="You can imbue a target with chaos as a melee touch attack. For the next round, anytime the target rolls a d20, he must roll twice and take the less favorable result." useMod=Wis3}

::ab[Chaos Blade (Su)]{id=blade l=8 icon=boost standard="You can give a weapon touched the ‹magic-enh/anarchic› special weapon quality for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level." useInc="4~cleric~8"}

::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="protection from law~align weapon|chaos only~magic circle against law~chaos hammer~dispel law~animate objects~word of chaos~cloak of chaos~summon monster IX|chaos spell only" save=domain}
‹family/Azata«s› are a race of chaotic good outsiders.

::ab[Elysium's Call (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of chaos/#touch›› power of the Chaos domain" icon=aid-def-boost standard="With a touch, you can imbue creatures with the spirit of Elysium, lifting their spirits and freeing them from bonds. The creatures touched can immediately reroll any failed saving throws against spells and spell-like abilities of the enchantment (charm) and enchantment (compulsion) subschools. In addition, targets receive a +2 sacred bonus on such saving throws and a +2 sacred bonus on CMB checks to escape a grapple. Finally, targets can ignore up to 5 feet of ‹rule/difficult terrain› each round, as if they had the ‹feat/Nimble Moves› feat. These bonuses last for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum 1), although the saving throw reroll only applies when the creature is touched." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="expeditious retreat" l3=fly l6="planar ally|azata only"}

::ab[Faith-Stealing Strike (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of chaos/#touch›› ability of the Chaos domain" icon=melee standard="You can make a single melee attack using your highest base attack bonus against a creature capable of casting divine spells. If you damage the creature, it must succeed at a Will save (DC = 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier) or be unable to cast any divine spells for 1 round. If you do not damage your target with the attack, this ability is expended with no effect." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="align weapon|chaos or evil only" l6="corrosive consumption"}
‹family/Demon«s› are a race of chaotic evil outsiders.

::ab[Fury of the Abyss (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of chaos/#touch›› power of the Chaos domain" icon=boost swift="As a swift action, you can give yourself an enhancement bonus equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum +1) on melee attacks, melee damage rolls, and combat maneuver checks. This bonus lasts for 1 round. During this round, you take a -2 penalty to AC." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=doom l3=rage l6="planar binding|demons only"}
‹SOURCE Book of the Damned/180;Inner Sea Gods/224;Blood of Fiends/15›

::ab[Hasten the End (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹chaos blade/#blade›› power of the Chaos domain" l=8 icon=melee immediate="Upon successfully hitting an opponent with a melee attack, you may reduce the remaining duration of all beneficial magical effects currently affecting the target by 1 round, minute, hour, or day - whichever measurement is used to determine the duration of each particular magical effect." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="entropic shield" l3="dispel magic" l5=confusion l7=destruction}
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Bastet~Besmara~Gorum~Hei Feng~Nephthys~Rovagug~Sekhmet~Sivanah~Sobek~Speakers of the Depths~Sun Wukong"}
‹family/Protean«s› are a race of chaotic neutral outsiders.

::ab[Aura of Chaos (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹chaos blade/#blade›› power of the Chaos domain" l=8 icon=aura standard="You can surround yourself with a field of wild energies. Thee energies manifest as a 30-foot aura of chaos for a number of rounds per day equal to your cleric level. All enemies within this aura must declare one type of action at the start of their turn (attack, cast a spell, move, use an item, or activate a special ability) and make a Will save. Creatures that fail the Will save must take an action other than their declared action. If they succeed, they must take the declared action. Creatures cannot select actions that they cannot perform."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="lesser confusion" l3=displacement l6="planar binding|proteans only"}
‹SOURCE Book of the Damned/181;Champions of Purity/21;Inner Sea Gods/226›

::ab[Intense Celebration (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹chaos blade/#blade›› ability of the Chaos domain" l=8 icon=magic passive="Spells you cast that confer a morale effect upon you or your allies are automatically affected as if by the ‹feat/Extend Spell› metamagic feat, but with no increase in spell level."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="hideous laughter" l3="good hope" l6="heroes' feast" l8="irresistible dance"}

::ab[Aura of Bedlam (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹chaos blade/#blade›› power of the Chaos domain" l=8 icon=lower standard="You can emit a 30-foot-radius aura of chaos and strife. Enemies in the aura take a penalty on ‹rule/concentration› checks and are treated as experiencing vigorous motion (concentration DC = 10 + spell level) when attempting to cast spells. The penalty is equal to ‹misc/one-half› of your cleric level. This is a mind-affecting effect." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l4=confusion l7="song of discord" l9="symbol of strife"}

::ab[Unexpected Whimsy (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹chaos blade/#blade›› of the Chaos domain" l=8 icon=aura standard="You dance, act like a buffoon, or commit some other act of whimsy. When you do, enemies within 30 feet of you that can see and hear you must succeed a Will saving throw (DC = 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + half your Wisdom modifier) or they collapse into gales of manic laughter, falling prone. Those who fail their saving throws can take no actions other than laughing for 1 round, but are not considered ‹misc/helpless›." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="hideous laughter" l4=confusion l6="cloak of dreams"}

A cleric (or any other character capable of selecting a domain) who worships the deity in question can choose to gain the variant domain power upon first gaining the domain in question, but the choice to replace the domain power must be made immediately upon gaining access to that domain and cannot be changed thereafter.

‹faith/Cayden Cailean› stands opposed to any force that denies free will. Servants of Cayden make unique exorcists, as their methods radically differ from those of other churches, despite often using similar spells and items. Spirited consumption of alcohol usually precedes any formal activity, and while it may seem to onlookers that Caydenites are feckless drunks, the devoted use this time to elicit truthful statements about the possessed from those with whom they drink. In this way, the servants of Cayden ensure they have all the proper information before moving against a supernatural threat, which they undoubtedly do with a (mostly) sober head.

::ab[Drunken Autonomy (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of chaos/#touch›› domain power of the Chaos domain" icon=def swift="Whenever under the effects of mind-affecting magic, possession, or similar external control, you can channel the unrestricted nature of your god. Instead of acting under the compulsion, you instead act as though you had the ‹misc/confused› condition for 1 round. Producing the &quot&act normally&quot& result allows you to act free of mental compulsion for that round." useMod=Wis3}

azata.name: Azata
description: This subdomain is associated with both the ‹domain/Chaos› and ‹domain/Good› domains.

demodand.name: Demodand and Demon
description: These subdomains are associated with both the ‹domain/Chaos› and ‹domain/Evil› domains.

charm.name: Charm
description: ::list[Deities]{link=faith all="Ardad Lili~Arshea~Bastet~Belial~Bolka~Calistria~Cayden Cailean~Dachzerul~Droskar~Eritrice~Folca~Grandmother Spider~Hathor~Hembad~Isis~Kofusachi~Laivatiniel~Mestama~Mrtyu~Naderi~Nalinivati~Nephthys~Nocticula~Norgorber~Onamahli~Onmyuza~Picoperi~Scarmiglione~Seramaydiel~Shamira~Shelyn~Shelyn (pre-Earthfall)~Socothbenoth~The Green Mother~The Lantern King~Ulon~Upion and Warrik~Velgaas~Verex~Vermilion Mother~Xsistaid~Zaigasnar~Zepar"}
@HL[Granted Powers:] You can baffle and befuddle foes with a touch or a smile, and your beauty and grace are divine.

::ab[Dazing Touch (Sp)]{id=touch icon=touch standard="You can cause a living creature to become ‹misc/dazed› for 1 round as a melee touch attack. Creatures with more Hit Dice than your cleric level are unaffected." useMod=Wis3}

::ab[Charming Smile (Sp)]{id=smile l=8 icon=zap swift="You can cast *charm person* with a DC of 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier. You can only have one creature charmed in this way at a time." usage="The total number of rounds of this effect per day is equal to your cleric level. The rounds do not need to be consecutive, and you can dismiss the charm at any time as a free action. Each attempt to use this ability consumes 1 round of its duration, whether or not the creature succeeds on its save to resist the effect."}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}

::ab[Entrancing Aura (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹charming smile/#smile›› power of the Charm domain" icon=lower standard="You can emit an imperceptible 30-foot aura of distraction. Enemies within this aura take a -5 penalty on Perception checks and are treated as though they had 2 fewer Hit Dice (minimum 1 Hit Die) for the purpose of your effects that would give them the ‹misc/fascinated› condition." imp16="Enemies are instead treated as if they had 3 fewer Hit Dice for such effects." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=hypnotism l2="hypnotic pattern" l4="rainbow pattern"}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Ardad Lili~Arshea~Bolka~Cayden Cailean~Hathor~Hembad~Isis~Kofusachi~Laivatiniel~Naderi~Nalinivati~Shamira~Shelyn~Shelyn (pre-Earthfall)~Socothbenoth~The Lantern King~Upion and Warrik"}

::ab[Adoration (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹dazing touch/#touch›› power of the Charm domain" icon=def immediate="You can attempt to thwart a melee or ranged attack that targets you. This ability functions as ‹spell/sanctuary›, but only against one individual attack. You must use the ability after the attack is declared but before the roll is made. The creature attacking you receives a Will save to negate this effect. If a creature has more than one attack, this ability only affects one of the attacks. This is a mind-affecting effect." useMod=Wis3}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Ardad Lili~Arshea~Bastet~Belial~Bolka~Calistria~Cayden Cailean~Folca~Kofusachi~Lymnieris~Menxyr~Mestama~Naderi~Nalinivati~Nephthys~Nocticula~Onamahli~Onmyuza~Scarmiglione~Shamira~Slandrais~Socothbenoth~The Green Mother~The Lantern King~Ulon~Verex~Vermilion Mother~Zaigasnar~Zepar"}

::ab[Anything to Please (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹charming smile/#smile›› power of the Charm domain" l=8 icon=zap standard="You can compel a creature within 30 feet to attempt to please you. The creature receives a Will save to negate this affect. If the save fails, the creature attacks your enemies for 1 round, gives you its most valuable item, or drops ‹rule/prone› at your feet and grovels for 1d4 rounds (GM's choice). This is a mind-affecting effect." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="touch of idiocy" l4=confusion}

community.name: Community
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] Your touch can heal wounds, and your presence instills unity and strengthens emotional bonds.

::ab[Calming Touch (Sp)]{id=touch icon=aid standard="You can touch a creature as a standard action to heal it of 1d6 points of nonlethal damage + 1 point per cleric level. This touch also removes the ‹misc/fatigued›, ‹misc/shaken›, and ‹misc/sickened› conditions (but has no effect on more severe conditions)." useMod=Wis3}

::ab[Unity (Su)]{id=unity l=8 icon=protect immediate="Whenever a spell or effect targets you and one or more allies within 30 feet, you can use this ability to allow your allies to use your saving throw against the effect in place of their own. Each ally must decide individually before the rolls are made." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="bless~shield other~prayer~imbue with spell ability~telepathic bond~heroes' feast~refuge~mass cure critical wounds~miracle" save=domain}

::ab[Synergistic Touch (Sp)]{replace="The ‹‹calming touch/#touch›› ability of the Community domain" icon=touch standard="You can touch a creature to confer upon it the benefits of any one teamwork feat that you possess. This effect persists for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum 1)." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="borrow skill" l2="share language" l3="coordinated effort"}

::ab[Teaching Moment (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹unity/#unity›› power of the Community domain" l=8 icon=aid-roll immediate="When you or an ally within 30 feet rolls a natural 1 or a natural 20 on an attack roll, an ability check, a skill check, or a saving throw, you can grant all allies within 30 feet special insights that help them overcome similar challenges. Once during the next minute, each affected creature can choose to roll twice and take the better result before attempting an attack roll, ability check, skill check, or saving throw." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="know the enemy" l2="fox's cunning" l6="battlemind link" l8="circle of clarity"}

::ab[Binding Ties (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹calming touch/#touch›› power of the Community domain" icon=protect standard="You can touch an ally and remove one condition affecting the ally by transferring it to yourself. This transfer lasts a number of rounds equal to your cleric level, but you can end it as a @HLfree_action on your turn. At the end of this effect, the condition reverts to the original creature, unless it has ended or is removed by another effect. While this power is in use, the target is immune to the transferred condition." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="calm emotions" l3="create food and water"}

::ab[Guarded Hearth (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹unity/#unity›› power of the Community domain" l=8 icon=protect ability="You can create a ward that protects a specified area. Creating this ward takes 10 minutes of uninterrupted work. This ward has a maximum radius of 5 feet per 2 cleric levels you possess. When the ward is completed, you designate any number of creatures inside its area. Should any other creature enter the warded area, all of the selected creatures are immediately alerted (and awoken if they were asleep). The designated creatures also receive a sacred bonus equal to your Wisdom modifier on all saving throws and attack rolls while inside the warded area. This ward immediately ends if you leave the area. The ward lasts for 1 hour per cleric level." usage="Once a day"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=alarm l3="glyph of warding" l7="guards and wards"}

education.name: Education
description: This subdomain is associated with both the ‹domain/Community› and ‹domain/Knowledge› domains.

darkness.name: Darkness
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You manipulate shadows and darkness.
::ab[Bonus Feat (Ex)]{icon=power passive="You receive ‹feat/Blind-Fight› as a bonus feat."}

::ab[Touch of Darkness (Sp)]{id=touch icon=touch ability="As a melee touch attack, you can cause a creature's vision to be fraught with shadows and darkness. The creature touched treats all other creatures as if they had ‹rule/concealment›, suffering a 20% miss chance on all attack rolls. This effect lasts for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum 1)." useMod=Wis3}
::ab[Eyes of Darkness (Su)]{id=eyes l=8 icon=power ability="Your vision is not impaired by lighting conditions, even in absolute darkness and magic darkness." useInc="2~cleric" useNC useUnit=round}

::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="obscuring mist~blindness/deafness|only to cause blindness~deeper darkness~shadow conjuration~summon monster V|summons 1d3 shadows~shadow walk~power word blind~greater shadow evocation~shades" save=domain}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Ah Pook~Ahriman~Alazhra~Apollyon~Count Ranalc~Diceid~Droskar~Groetus~Iggeret~Lao Shu Po~Maeha~Mordiggian~Nalmungder~Nightripper~Nocticula~Nyarlathotep (Haunter of the Dark)~Rahu~Reymenda~Set~Shawnari~Shivaska~Sifkesh~Slandrais~Tresmalvos~Zon-Kuthon"}

::ab[Aura of Forgetfulness (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹eyes of darkness/#eyes›› power of the Darkness domain" l=8 icon=aura standard="You can emit a 30-foot aura of forgetfulness. Creatures you target in this area must make a Will save or have no memory of any time spent inside the area. In addition, spellcasters in the area lose one prepared spell or available spell slot per round spent in the area, starting with 1st-level spells and going up through higher-level spells. Spellcasters are allowed a save each round to negate this loss (this save is separate from the memory loss save)." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l5=enervation l6="modify memory" l9="energy drain"}
‹SOURCE Book of the Damned/181;Dragon Empires Gazetteer/57;Dragon Empires Primer/27;Inner Sea Gods/226›

::ab[Moonfire (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹eyes of darkness/#eyes›› power of the Darkness domain" l=8 icon=zap standard="You can shoot a blast of divine moonlight from your eyes as a ranged touch attack against a single target within 30 feet. Moonfire deals 1d8 points of damage per 2 class levels you have, and the target is ‹misc/dazzled› for 1 round per class level you have. Moonfire deals 1d10 points of damage per class level you have against lycanthropes." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="faerie fire" l4=moonstruck l6=dream}

::ab[Night Hunter (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of darkness/#touch›› power of the Darkness domain" icon=def standard="You can blend into the shadows of the night, becoming nearly invisible. As long as you are in an area of ‹rule/dim light› or darkness, you are invisible (as per ‹spell/invisibility›) to creatures without darkvision. This ability lasts for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum 1)." useMod=Wis3}

::ab[Whispering Shadows (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of darkness/#touch›› ability of the Darkness domain" icon=zap-roll immediate="You can darken the shadows around you and cause them to hiss, confounding and distracting your enemies. You force a target within 30 feet to reroll a miss chance due to ‹rule/concealment› or a saving throw against an illusion or necromancy spell. The target of this ability must keep the result of the second roll, even if it is worse than the original roll." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="ray of enfeeblement" l4="phantasmal killer" l8="orb of the void"}

shadow.name: Shadow
description: This subdomain is associated with both the ‹domain/Darkness› and ‹domain/Death› domains.

death.name: Death
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You can cause the living to bleed at a touch, and find comfort in the presence of the dead.

::ab[Bleeding Touch (Sp)]{id=touch icon=touch ability="You can cause a living creature to take 1d6 points of damage per round. This effect persists for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum 1) or until stopped with a DC 15 Heal check or any spell or effect that heals damage." useMod=Wis3}

::ab[Death's Embrace (Ex)]{id=hug l=8 icon=boost passive="You heal damage instead of taking damage from channeled negative energy. If the channeled negative energy targets undead, you heal hit points just like undead in the area."}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="cause fear~death knell~animate dead~death ward~slay living~create undead~destruction~create greater undead~wail of the banshee" save=domain}
These adjustments make the Death domain more in line with ‹faith/Pharasma«'s› tenets.
::spelllist[Adjusted Domain Spells]{from=domain l3="speak with dead" l6="antilife shell" l8="symbol of death"}

::ab[Killing Blow (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹death's embrace/#hug›› power of the Death domain" l=8 icon=melee passive="Weapons you use become infused with the power of death. Whenever you confirm a critical hit with a melee or ranged weapon, your attack deals an additional amount of ‹rule/bleed› damage equal to half your cleric level." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l3="keen edge" l5=suffocation l9="mass suffocation"}

::ab[Touch of Virulence (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹death's embrace/#hug›› power of the Death domain" l=8 icon=touch standard="You can touch a diseased creature and exacerbate its condition. If it fails a Fortitude save (DC = 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier), the creature takes damage as though it had failed its Fortitude save against the disease and any remaining onset time for the disease ends." useInc="6~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="ray of sickening" l3=contagion l6="plague storm" l8="horrid wilting"}
‹family/Psychopomp«s› are a race of neutral outsiders.

::ab[Spirit Touch (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹death's embrace/#hug›› ability of the Death domain" l=6 icon=boost swift="You can give your natural weapons or any weapons you wield the ‹magic-enh/ghost touch› weapon special ability." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l3="chain of perdition" l6="planar ally|psychopomps only" l8="trap the soul"}

::ab[Whispering Shadows (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹bleeding touch/#touch›› ability of the Death domain" icon=roll immediate="You can darken the shadows around you and cause them to hiss, confounding and distracting your enemies. You force a target within 30 feet to reroll a miss chance due to ‹rule/concealment› or a saving throw against an illusion or necromancy spell. The target of this ability must keep the result of the second roll, even if it is worse than the original roll." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="ray of enfeeblement" l4="phantasmal killer" l8="orb of the void"}

::ab[Death's Kiss (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹bleeding touch/#touch›› power of the Death domain" icon=touch ability="You can cause a creature to take on some of the traits of the undead with a melee touch attack. Touched creatures are treated as undead for the purposes of effects that heal or cause damage based on positive and negative energy. This effect lasts for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum 1). It does not apply to the ‹feat/Turn Undead› or ‹feat/Command Undead› feats." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="ghoul touch" l4=enervation l9="energy drain"}

A cleric (or any other character capable of selecting a domain) who worships the deity in question can choose to gain the variant domain power upon first gaining the domain in question, but the choice to replace the domain power must be made immediately upon gaining access to that domain and cannot be changed thereafter.

A risen spirit is akin to a plant that must be tended. Such are the teachings of ‹faith/Urgathoa›, the goddess who is believed to be the first undead creature. Unlike many of her deific counterparts, Urgathoa champions the shepherding and protection of haunts and possessing spirits, even to the danger and detriment of her own followers. The faithful of the Pallid Princess believe that by prolonging the torment and tortured existence of a spirit, they create something akin to a beautiful piece of artwork. In a similar manner, servants of Urgathoa view the possession of a mortal body by a deceased spirit as a blessing.

::ab[Necrotic Tending (Sp)]{replace="The ‹‹bleeding touch/#touch›› domain power of the Death domain" icon=aid standard="You can touch an undead creature or area affected by a haunt, restoring 1d8 hit points + 1 for every 2 cleric levels you have. This ability has no effect on other creatures." useMod=Wis3}

plague.name: Plague
description: This subdomain is associated with both the ‹domain/Death› and ‹domain/Evil› domains.

psychopomp.name: Psychopomp
description: This subdomain is associated with both the ‹domain/Death› and ‹domain/Repose› domains.

destruction.name: Destruction
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You revel in ruin and devastation, and can deliver particularly destructive attacks.

::ab[Destructive Smite (Su)]{id=smite icon=melee ability="You gain the destructive smite power: the supernatural ability to make a single melee attack with a morale bonus on damage rolls equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum 1). You must declare the destructive smite before making the attack." useMod=Wis3}

::ab[Destructive Aura (Su)]{id=aura l=8 icon=aura standard="You can emit a 30-foot aura of destruction. All attacks made against targets in this aura (including you) gain a morale bonus on damage equal to 1/2 your cleric level and all critical threats are automatically confirmed." useL=cleric useNC}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Ah Pook~Ahriman~Apep~Apollyon~Azathoth~Belial~Bokrug~Charg~Dagon~Dahak~Deskari~Diceid~Doloras~Draghignazzo~Eiseth~Feronia~Ghatanothoa~Ghlaunder~Groetus~Hastrikhal~Hei Feng~Jubilex~Kelizandri~Lady Nanbyo~Libicocco~Mazmezz~Mhar~Nataka~Nethys~Ovonovo~Reymenda~Rovagug~Scal~Shyka~Speakers of the Depths~Thuskchoon~Treerazer~Urxehl~Ushitora~Venkelvore~Xsistaid~Yabu~Ymeri~Zagresh~Zon-Kuthon~Zurapadyn~Zyphus"}

::ab[Deadly Weather (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹destructive aura/#aura›› power of the Destruction domain" l=8 icon=magic standard="You can unleash a furious call to the heavens, summoning forth an ever-changing storm of destruction. This storm has a radius of 5 feet per cleric level. Each round, the storm has one of the following effects: driving rain (-4 on all Perception checks and ranged attack rolls), howling winds (-8 on Fly skill checks and ranged attack rolls), heavy snow (all terrain is considered difficult), or lightning bolt (as *call lightning*). Other effects depending on the weather might also apply (at the GM's discretion). You choose which effect takes place each round, but no effect may be repeated on the following round." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="gust of wind" l3="call lightning" l7="control weather"}

::ab[Hateful Aura (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹destructive aura/#aura›› ability of the Destruction domain" l=8 icon=aura standard="You can emit a 30-foot aura of hatred. Enemies within this aura must attempt a Will save (DC = 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier). Characters who fail their save are filled with hatred, and cannot consider other characters allies for the purpose of any actions or use any teamwork feats. The effect ends immediately if the creature leaves the aura, you end the aura as a free action, or you expend all rounds of this ability." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="murderous command" l2="wrathful mantle"}

::ab[Rage (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹destructive aura/#aura›› power of the Destruction domain" l=8 icon=boost ability="You can enter a fearsome rage, like a ‹class/barbarian›. At 12th and 16th level, you can select one ‹ability/rage power<s›. You cannot select any rage power that possesses a level requirement, but otherwise your barbarian level is equal to 1/2 your cleric level. These rounds of rage stack with any rounds of rage you might have from levels of barbarian." useL=cleric}
‹SOURCE Book of the Damned/182;Inner Sea Gods/227;Goblins of Golarion/27›

::ab[Painful Smite (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹destructive smite/#smite›› power of the Destruction domain" icon=melee ability="Prior to making a melee attack roll, you can choose to convert all damage from that strike into nonlethal damage, adding your Wisdom modifier to the damage. If your attack hits, as a free action you can attempt an Intimidate check to demoralize the target. You gain a bonus on this Intimidate check equal to the amount of nonlethal damage dealt by the painful smite." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="pain strike" l5="symbol of pain" l8=demand}

earth.name: Earth
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You have mastery over earth, metal, and stone, can fire darts of acid, and command earth creatures.

::ab[Acid Dart (Sp)]{id=dart icon=zap standard="As a standard action, you can unleash an acid dart targeting any foe within 30 feet as a ranged touch attack. This acid dart deals 1d6 points of acid damage + 1 point for every two cleric levels you possess." useMod=Wis3}
::ab[Acid Resistance (Ex)]{id=res icon=def l6="You gain ‹umr/resist› acid 10." l12="Your acid resistance increases to 20." l20="You gain ‹umr/immunity› to acid."}

::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="magic stone~soften earth and stone~stone shape~spike stones~wall of stone~stoneskin~elemental body IV|earth only~earthquake~elemental swarm|earth spell only" save=domain}

::ab[Tunnel Runner (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹acid resistance/#res›› power of the Earth domain" l=8 icon=power standard="You can choose to move through tunnels and caves with ease. While this ability is active, you can move across any stone surface as if under the effects of ‹spell/spider climb›. You can also see very well in darkness, gaining darkvision out to a range of 60 feet. If you already possess darkvision, extend the range by 60 feet. While underground, you also gain an insight bonus equal to your cleric level on Stealth skill checks and an insight bonus equal to your Wisdom modifier on initiative checks." useL=cleric useUnit=minute useNC=1}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="create pit" l3="spiked pit" l6="hungry pit"}

::ab[Metal Fist (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹acid dart/#dart›› power of the Earth domain" icon=melee swift="You can turn your fists into metal for 1 round, allowing you to make unarmed strikes that deal 1d6 points of bludgeoning damage plus your Strength modifier. These unarmed strikes do not provoke attacks of opportunity, but attacking with both uses the two-weapon fighting rules as normal. In addition, these unarmed strikes ignore the hardness of items with a hardness of 10 or less." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="heat metal" l6="wall of iron" l8="iron body"}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}

::ab[Fossil Form (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹acid dart/#dart›› power of the Earth domain" icon=def swift="At the beginning of your turn, you can infuse your flesh with minerals, granting you cumbersome security. Until the beginning of your next turn, you are ‹misc/staggered›, gain hardness 2, and gain a +2 bonus on saving throws against petrification. This hardness increases by 2 and your saving throw bonus increases by 1 for every 4 cleric levels you have." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l4="calcific touch" l5=stoneskin l6="flesh to stone" l8=statue}
@HL[Replacement Power:] Note: Only creatures with the ‹trait/Kobold Faith› trait can take this subdomain.

::ab[Radiating Touch (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹acid dart/#dart›› power of the Earth domain" icon=touch provokes standard="You can irradiate any unattended object for a number of rounds equal to your cleric level. While an object is irradiated, it emits a faint aura of transmutation. Any creature that passes within 5 feet of the aura must succeed at a Will save (DC equal to 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier) or become ‹misc/sickened›. You're immune to this object's effect." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2=defoliate l4=blight l8="horrid wilting"}

fire.name: Fire
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You can call forth fire, command creatures of the inferno, and your flesh does not burn.

::ab[Fire Bolt (Sp)]{id=bolt icon=zap standard="You can unleash a scorching bolt of divine fire from your outstretched hand. You can target any single foe within 30 feet as a ranged touch attack with this bolt of fire. If you hit the foe, the fire bolt deals 1d6 points of fire damage + 1 point for every two cleric levels you possess." useMod=Wis3}
::ab[Fire Resistance (Ex)]{id=res icon=def l6="You gain ‹umr/resist› fire 10." l12="Your resistance increases to 20." l20="You gain ‹umr/immunity› to fire."}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="burning hands~produce flame~fireball~wall of fire~fire shield~fire seeds~elemental body IV|fire only~incendiary cloud~elemental swarm|fire spell only" save=domain}
‹SOURCE Book of the Damned/180;Goblins of Golarion/27;Inner Sea Gods/224›

::ab[Call Fire (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹fire bolt/#bolt›› power of the Fire domain" icon=line standard="You can stretch out your hand toward any visible fire source within 60 feet and beckon it toward you. This causes a ribbon-thin streak of fire to approach you in a straight line through the air. Any creature directly in the fire ribbon's path takes 1d4 points of fire damage; a successful Reflex save (DC = 10 + half your class level + your Wisdom modifier) negates this damage. When the ribbon of fire reaches your hand, it either extinguishes or lights a flammable object of your choice that you're holding." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="flaming sphere" l5="flame strike" l7="delayed blast fireball"}

::ab[Wall of Ashes (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹fire resistance/#res›› power of the Fire domain" l=8 icon=magic standard="You can create a wall of swirling ashes anywhere within 100 feet. This wall is up to 20 feet high and up to 10 feet long per cleric level you possess. The wall of ash blocks line of sight, and any creature passing through it must make a Fortitude save or be ‹misc/blinded› for 1d4 rounds. The wall of ash reveals invisible creatures that are inside it or adjacent to it, although they become invisible again if they move away from the wall." useL=cleric useUnit=minute useNC=1}

::ab[Cloud of Smoke (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹fire bolt/#bolt›› power of the Fire domain" icon=magic standard="As a standard action, you can create a 5-foot-radius cloud of smoke. This power has a range of 30 feet. Creatures inside the cloud take a -2 penalty on attack rolls and Perception skill checks for as long as they remain inside and for 1 round after exiting the cloud. Creatures inside the cloud gain ‹rule/concealment› from attacks made by opponents that are not adjacent to them." useMod=Wis3}
